rulings.Case Title: INTERSTATE FIRE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CLEVAND WRECKING COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Interstate To Provide Further Discovery Resposes And To Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 1, 2011, line 2. DEFENDANT CLEVAND WRECKING COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Interstate To Provide Further Discovery Resposes And To Produce Documents. Defendant's motion to compel further responses granted as to special interrogatories 3, 6, 7, 8, 9, 15, 16, 18, 21, 23, 24, 28, 31, 35, 38, 39, 43, 46, 47, 50, 51, 54 and 62. The responses are evasive and factually deficient. The motion is denied as to special interrogatories 71-81. They are overbroad and seek information that is not relevant to this case. The motion is denied as to form interrogatories 4.1 and 12.1. These seek information that is not discoverable under Catholic Mutual Relief Society v. Superior Court (2007) Cal 4th 358. Hearing required on what information has been produced and what is still in dispute as to the document request. Plaintiff should prepare a privilege log. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CLAUDIA CARDINALLE et al VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, A NATIONAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 1, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. As to the 4th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead what is alleged to be due and owing as to this defendant. As to the 3rd cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend because this defendant has no interest in the property. The demurrer is overruled as to all other causes of action on all other grounds. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: GARY WAI SHING WONG et al VS. FIRST CALIFORNIA MORTGAGE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, April 1, 2011, line 6. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained. The demurrer as to the 1st cause of action is sustained without leave to amend as unjust enrichment is a form of restitution not a valid cause of action. As to the 2nd cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead the unfair business practice with more particularity (see below as to 3rd, 4th causes of action). As to the 3rd and 4th causes of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead more facts with sufficient particularity as to who made the misrepresentation and when. As to the 5th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The only remedy for wrongful foreclosure is postponement before it happens. Mabrey v. Superior Court (2010) 185 Cal.App.4th 208, 238. Further, once an unlawful detainer judgment has been rendered, subsequent quiet title suits are barred. Malkoskie v. Option One Mortgage Corp. (2010) 188 CA 4th 968, 974. =(302/LMG)
